FOOTER.TAGLINE: Secure, fast and private file sharing. Direct streaming or temporary cloud storage. Native end-to-end encryption.

DROP_ZONE.NO_LIMIT: 📦 Max 1 GB free · Unlimited with Premium

HOME.HERO_SUBTITLE: Secure sharing via Cloudflare R2. Native HTTPS/TLS 1.3 encryption. Up to 1 GB free.
HOME.SECURITY_DESC: All transfers are protected with HTTPS/TLS 1.3 encryption. Every file is verified via xxHash128 hash before and after transfer.
HOME.FEATURE_FAST_DESC: Chunked streaming on R2 — no permanent storage
HOME.FEATURE_SECURE_DESC: Native HTTPS encryption and xxHash128 integrity check
HOME.FEATURE_SIMPLE_DESC: Drag & drop, generate link and share in seconds
HOME.FEATURE_PREMIUM_DESC: Unlimited files, advanced encryption, zero ads

HERO.LABEL: About Us
HERO.SUBTITLE: Bam! was born with a simple mission: give back control of your files to you. Secure transfer via Cloudflare R2, with native encryption and temporary storage.

HERO.LABEL: Plans & Pricing
HERO.SUBTITLE: Choose the perfect plan for your needs

HERO.LABEL: Security
HERO.SUBTITLE: Every transfer on Bam! is protected by end-to-end encryption. No file ever transits our servers.

E2EE.LABEL: Protocol
E2EE.TITLE: Native End-to-End Encryption
E2EE.P1_B: (Transport Layer Security) connections that automatically encrypt all data in transit. This happens at the transport layer, without any configuration by the user.
E2EE.P2: Encryption is active by default on every transfer, regardless of the chosen plan. Data is encrypted in transit and never accessible in plaintext by our servers. No intermediary — including Bam! — can access file content during transfer.

PASSWORD.LABEL: Premium
PASSWORD.TITLE: Premium Password Encryption
PASSWORD.P1_A: Premium users can add an extra layer of protection with
PASSWORD.P1_B: encryption. The encryption key is derived from the user's chosen password via
PASSWORD.P2_A: The entire operation happens through the native browser's
PASSWORD.P2_B: . The password is never transmitted or stored: only the sender and recipient know it. Completely

INTEGRITY.LABEL: Integrity
INTEGRITY.TITLE: Integrity Verification
INTEGRITY.P1_A: Every transferred file is verified via
INTEGRITY.P1_B: hash. The hash is calculated on the sender side before sending and compared on the receiver side upon download completion, guaranteeing the file was not altered during transfer.
INTEGRITY.RANGE_SM_DESC: Main thread — xxHash128 incremental streaming, no full memory allocation.
INTEGRITY.RANGE_MD_DESC: Web Worker + hash-wasm — non-blocking xxHash128 in separate thread.
INTEGRITY.RANGE_LG_DESC: Automatic verification on completion — no configuration required.

ZERO_CLOUD.LABEL: Architecture
ZERO_CLOUD.TITLE: Temporary Storage
ZERO_CLOUD.P1_B: and are automatically deleted: immediately after download in Burn mode, or when the link expires in Cloud mode (maximum 3 days). No data is retained beyond what is necessary.
ZERO_CLOUD.P2_B: — real-time notifications between sender and recipient via Supabase Realtime. File content transits encrypted via HTTPS and is never accessible in plaintext from our infrastructure.

VULN.TITLE: Vulnerability Reporting
VULN.P1: We believe in collaborative security. If you discover a vulnerability or security issue, we invite you to responsibly report it to us.
VULN.P2_POST: with a detailed description of the issue. We commit to responding within 48 hours and resolving confirmed vulnerabilities as quickly as possible.

GDPR.TITLE: GDPR Compliance
GDPR.DESC_A: Bam! is fully compliant with the European Union's General Data Protection Regulation (GDPR). We do not collect or store users' files. Personal data is processed in accordance with the principles of minimization, transparency and security required by the regulation. Signaling servers are hosted in the
GDPR.DESC_B: region to ensure data residency in Europe.

HOME.TITLE: Bam! – Fast & Secure File Sharing
HOME.DESC: Share files up to 1 GB for free. Secure streaming via Cloudflare R2, native TLS 1.3 encryption. No account needed.

ABOUT.TITLE: About – Bam!
ABOUT.DESC: Learn about Bam! – our mission, how the transfer works, and what we're building next.

PRICING.TITLE: Pricing – Bam!
PRICING.DESC: Free plan up to 1 GB. Premium unlocks unlimited transfers, custom slugs, password protection, and more.

SECURITY.TITLE: Security – Bam!
SECURITY.DESC: End-to-end encrypted transfers. TLS 1.3, server-side encryption at rest, zero-knowledge design.

TERMS.TITLE: Terms & Conditions – Bam!
TERMS.DESC: Read the terms and conditions for using the Bam! file sharing service.

PRIVACY.TITLE: Privacy Policy – Bam!
PRIVACY.DESC: How Bam! collects, uses, and protects your personal data.
